title: The-Fox-Burrow
description:
A medium modpack containing 113 Mods.
Made for a small discord comunity
body:
Always wanted to see what being a vampire in modern age would be? You can now! Become a vampire, travel to distant stars, and dominate the World of minecraft! 
If you enjoy automation and seeing numbers go up, this is the modpack for you!
This modpack is aimed at people with not so powerfull systems.
Some of the core mods in this modpack:
- Mekanism.
- Refined Storage.
- Immersive engineering.
- Botanica.

What do you get by playing my modpack? Well, you can play with your friends on our community server. Playing and trying to survive in the harsh world of Minecraft. Try beating the enderdragon and making it to the top-tier technology. **Become a Dracula, a werewolf, or an industrial juggernaut in your world.** Join the community server and become one of the greatest!
